reviews.review_title: Good game but a lot of issues and more..
reviews.review_description: Monkey Funky is a good game and it’s fun but there is a lot of bugs and glitches like the player model is weird and glitchy and the voice chat is low also the platforms need work and the skis are a little too slippery and need some work also then entity in the back rooms map needs to do like respawn you somewhere we he gets you because all he does is pushed you or follows you and it’s not scary. Also people can change there name to whatever they want and they won’t get banned or warned for it and there is no reporting system. Another bug/glitch is the keyboard, it wont even work for me and idk why I have even tried restarting my game but it doesn’t seem to fix it. Also another thing that would be nice is more cosmetics and limited time cosmetics and another thing is you should be able to use real life money to buy bananas. Another thing is for the cosmetics, the cosmetics are not even like in your hand or on your arm they are just floating above your arm and it gets annoying and when you join sandbox they go away. Last thing is how you can see your eyes and mouth when your playing and it gets annoying because who wants to see there monkey face while playing a game and I think it’s very annoying and it just doesn’t feel right
Free platforms and easy to get cosmetics and the backrooms makes it really good

reviews.review_description: Server this game over all really fun I would like if I could get mod maybe some of u guys can catch me in game I play this a lot because of the building mechanic but people often grief me I enjoy making houses but then I get boxed in and etc typical grief I could make this game a better place and will give several warnings before action is taken this game overall is great play it and go into pvp and sandbox even troll a little if you want it’s a great experience and I recommend you download it

The game is fun I feel that It could use some sort of Tagging game mode, and a cosmetic thing where you can put on cosmetics. Instead of hitting enable, and I also would like for this game to have limited time cosmetics! I think that it needs more cosmetics in this game, and I think you should be able to spend real life money to get in game currency! I feel that this game could also use some sort of color changing system.
